latest_evidence_summary: OpenNori lifecycle capability-bundle infrastructure now has a shared external-actions module for command runner, command display, action preview, summary counts, and applied/failed command results. setup.ts and plugin-sync.ts keep their product-specific setup and plugin sync logic, but no longer duplicate the same external command planning/execution infrastructure. Verified that setup and plugin sync preview outputs still expose the same setup-plan/plugin-sync-plan action surfaces and that lifecycle/CLI/typecheck checks pass.
